name: Broccoli Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine broccoli, onions, and mushrooms in a greased 10-inch microproof quiche dish or pie plate.
2. Cover and cook on HIGH (maximum power) for 5 minutes.
3. In a medium bowl, blend eggs and half and half.
4. Add rice, cheeses, salt, and pepper; stir.
5. Pour the mixture over the vegetables; stir gently.
6. Cook uncovered on MEDIUM (50% power) for 9 to 11 minutes, or until quiche is set.
7. Let stand for 10 minutes.
8. Garnish with tomato rose.
Each serving provides:
221 calories
12.6 g. protein
13.2 g. fat
12.8 g. carbohydrate
239 mg. sodium
171 mg. cholesterol
